pages.text: $(bold)PreFabs$() are upgraded Compact Machine blocks that enable factory compression.$(br2)They measure your factory's production rates and simulate them, allowing chunks to stay unloaded for massive performance gains.

pages.title: Creating a PreFab
pages.text: $(bold)Step 1:$() Place a Compact Machine block in the world.$(br2)$(bold)Step 2:$() Craft a $(l:getting_started/crafting)TPS Upgrade$() item.$(br2)$(bold)Step 3:$() Right-click the CM block with the TPS Upgrade.$(br2)The CM becomes a PreFab.
